use_cases: Display event details in a calendar or scheduling interface
Show upcoming events in a dashboard or landing page
List scheduled activities in an education or media platform
Present meeting or webinar information in a SaaS application
Highlight recurring events with frequency and timing information
ai_summary: A reusable event card component with smooth entrance animations and interactive hover effects. Displays event icon, title, date/time, and location in a clean card layout with primary color accents. Built with Framer Motion for animations and Tailwind CSS for styling, supporting custom className overrides for theming flexibility.
